apihelp-query+pageimages-summary: Waxay soo celisaa macluumaad ku saabsan sawirrada ku jira bogga, sida sawirka yar iyo jiritaanka sawirro.
apihelp-query+pageimages-example-1: Ka hel magaca iyo sawir yar oo cabbirkiisu yahay <kbd>100</kbd> pixel ee sawir ku yaal bogga <kbd>Albert Einstein</kbd>.
apihelp-query+pageimages-paramvalue-prop: URL-ka iyo cabbirrada sawirka thumbnail-ka ee ku xiran bogga, haddii uu jiro.
URL-ka iyo cabbirrada asalka ah ee sawirka ku xiran bogga, haddii uu jiro.
apihelp-query+pageimages-param-thumbsize: Ballaca ugu badan ee pixel ahaan ee sawirrada thumbnail-ka.
apihelp-query+pageimages-param-langcode: Koodhka luqadda ee sawirka lagu soo bandhigi doono haddii luqado badan la taageero
apihelp-query+pageimages-param-limit: Guryaha tirada bogagga la soo celinayo.
apihelp-query+pageimages-param-license: Ku xaddid sawirrada bogagga nooc gaar ah oo shati ah:
apihelp-query+pageimages-paramvalue-lice: Sawirka ugu fiican, ha ahaado bilaash ama aan bilaash ahayn.
